creator: esk@ira.uka.de
text:
I've added support for Norwegain dictinaries in the ispell port.  The
Norwegain dictionary is enabled by compiling the package with 
``ISPELL_NO=yes''.  Note that the Norwegian dictionary requires that
ispell be compiled with MASKBITS=64, and that ispell needs to be slightly
patched.

The Norwegian ispell adds one new file (files/NO.patch) to the port.
